category_sources: source_facts.description says GNU Make with improved error handling, tracing, and debugger; official homepage https://bashdb.sourceforge.net/remake/ describes remake as enhanced GNU Make.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is remake; official documentation title uses remake at https://remake.readthedocs.io/.
docs_sources: Official homepage links Read the Docs documentation, and https://remake.readthedocs.io/ provides feature and debugger documentation.
repo_sources: Official homepage https://bashdb.sourceforge.net/remake/ links a GitHub page; search result identifies the code location as https://github.com/rocky/remake.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs at https://remake.readthedocs.io/ describe GNU Make tracing, profiling, and debugger features.
